DataListSpec.Name: HFHI CRM Model Scores - Updated data List
DataListSpec.Description: Model scores with start and end dates for auditing and validation.
DataListSpec.Author: HFHCON-DEV\twillis

SPDataList.CreateProcedureSQL:
CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.USR_USP_DATALIST_HFHI_CRM_MODELSCORES_AUDIT ( @CONSTITUENTID UNIQUEIDENTIFIER ) AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON;
-- ADMA SELECT 'ADMA' AS MODELSCORETYPE, CAST(A.VALUE AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS SCORE, NULL AS MAXIMUMSCORE, A.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID AS ANALYTICSMODELID, 'ADMA Score' AS NAME, NEWID() AS ID, NULL AS DETAILVIEWFORMID, NULL AS RECORDTYPEIDS, NEWID() AS ATTRIBUTEKEY FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTED1DBE44C8F734152BDED6C3723A96873 A WHERE A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
-- SIMIO Mid-Level SELECT 'SIMIO - Mid Level' AS MODELSCORETYPE, CAST(A.VALUE AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS SCORE, NULL AS MAXIMUMSCORE, A.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID AS ANALYTICSMODELID, 'SIMIO Mid-Level Propensity' AS NAME, NEWID() AS ID, NULL AS DETAILVIEWFORMID, NULL AS RECORDTYPEIDS, NEWID() AS ATTRIBUTEKEY FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTE628D8C79C5354CDEBA04853FF4D1129C A WHERE A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
-- SIMIO Net Worth SELECT 'SIMIO - Net Worth' AS MODELSCORETYPE, CAST(A.SIMIONETWORTHPROPENSITYCODEID AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS SCORE, NULL AS MAXIMUMSCORE, A.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID AS ANALYTICSMODELID, 'SIMIO Net Worth Propensity' AS NAME, NEWID() AS ID, NULL AS DETAILVIEWFORMID, NULL AS RECORDTYPEIDS, NEWID() AS ATTRIBUTEKEY FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTE992C22EE8AF24ABF8E6AEF796C9EFFBB A WHERE A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = @CONSTITUENTID
UNION ALL
-- SIMIO Planned Giving SELECT 'SIMIO - Planned Giving' AS MODELSCORETYPE, CAST(A.VALUE AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS SCORE, NULL AS MAXIMUMSCORE, A.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, A.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID AS ANALYTICSMODELID, 'SIMIO Planned Giving Propensity' AS NAME, NEWID() AS ID, NULL AS DETAILVIEWFORMID, NULL AS RECORDTYPEIDS, NEWID() AS ATTRIBUTEKEY FROM dbo.ATTRIBUTEC14E96658FC544E0933F4DF1FA74CA6B A WHERE A.MODELINGANDPROPENSITYID = @CONSTITUENTID
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC;
END
